---
title: "install_skill.py"
path: "C:\Users\Craig\Corvus\CorvusStar\tests\fixtures\.agents\scripts\install_skill.py"
loc: 78
complexity: 21
logic_score: 0.72
style_score: 3.79
intel_score: 3.45
overall_score: 1.40
---

## Intent
The `install_skill.py` sector implements high-complexity logic focusing on _sanitize_skill_name, _validate_path, _get_config, _verify_integrity, _run_security_scan, _promote_skill, install_skill. It forms a critical node in the Gungnir Matrix.

## Interaction Protocol
Integrate via _sanitize_skill_name, _validate_path, _get_config, _verify_integrity, _run_security_scan, _promote_skill, install_skill. Follow the Linscott Standard for this sector.

## Gungnir Matrix Breakdown
- **Logic [L]**: 0.7/10
- **Style [S]**: 3.8/10
- **Intel [I]**: 3.5/10
- **Gravity [G]**: 8 interactions (Agent Activity Hotspot)



## Neural Pathways

### Imports
- [json](file://json)
- [os](file://os)
- [re](file://re)
- [shutil](file://shutil)
- [subprocess](file://subprocess)
- [sys](file://sys)
- [sv_engine](file://sv_engine)

### Exports
- `_sanitize_skill_name`
- `_validate_path`
- `_get_config`
- `_verify_integrity`
- `_run_security_scan`
- `_promote_skill`
- `install_skill`
